meaning: n.(旧时) 帆船附载的大艇
examples: Two women were vacationing in Longboat Key while they were floating on the rubber boat along the shore, a water scooter crashed into them and kill them.
We set out on his flame-colored longboat at 7:30 a. m.
Our longboat driver Gary... Okay Gary wasn't his real name but I think it fits.
Longboat, who had won the Boston Marathon the year before, collapsed 19 miles into the race, perhaps because of the champagne his assistants gave him along the way.
Shortly after booting up Dragonborn, the new DLC for Skyrim, I cautiously took a longboat out to Solstheim the (sort of) new island for the game.
